scripts.dev: npm run build -w @egovai/core && concurrently -k -n server,web -c blue,cyan "npm run dev -w @egovai/server" "npm run dev -w @egovai/web"
scripts.dev:web: npm run build -w @egovai/core && npm run dev -w @egovai/web
scripts.dev:server: npm run build -w @egovai/core && npm run dev -w @egovai/server
scripts.build: npm run build -w @egovai/core && npm run build -w @egovai/server && npm run build -w @egovai/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @egovai/core && npm run typecheck -w @egovai/server && npm run typecheck -w @egovai/web && npm run typecheck -w @egovai/core
